violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door slider have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment is to install an airgap. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Establishment is to obtain a receptacle with a cover. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
